deviations.name: Sealed Armor
deviations.desc: Enemies take 90% less damage from non-weak point hits.

risks.name: Bolstered Belligerents
risks.desc: All enemies have Overguard equal to 50% of their max health.

risks.name: Commanding Culverins
risks.desc: Rogue Culverins equip weapons that deal 5x Damage to Overguard and Necramechs.

deviations.name: Barbed Glyphs
deviations.desc: Each Glyph inflicts a small amount of damage when collected.

risks.name: Fortified Foes
risks.desc: Guardian Eximus units may be encountered, including Guardian Eximus Necramechs.

deviations.name: Unified Purpose
deviations.desc: Enemies can target and destroy Conduits.

risks.name: Bold Venture
risks.desc: Enemies deal -15% Damage and take +15% Damage but gain +15% Movement Speed, Attack Speed, and Fire Rate.

deviations.name: Cache Crash
deviations.desc: Consequences of opening a Supply Cache are active from the start and will intensify once it is opened. Failure to open a Supply Cache doubles the kill count required to finish the mission.

risks.name: Devil's Bargain
risks.desc: Allies within 4m of slain enemies gain +25% Fire Rate at the cost of -50% Ammo Efficiency.

risks.name: It's Alive
risks.desc: Within the underground, hostile overgrowths will attack if players stop moving.

deviations.name: Growth Hormones
deviations.desc: Legacytes are more powerful with each generation but take longer to escape.

risks.name: Techrot Speed Run
risks.desc: All enemies are replaced with Techrot and move much faster.

risks.name: Miasmite Swarm
risks.desc: Techrot Miasmites swarm out of the shadows throughout the mission.

deviations.name: Thermian Plating
deviations.desc: Only Thermian RPGs can damage the tank. Reinforcements that carry Thermian RPGs will arrive during the fight.

risks.name: Postmortal Surges
risks.desc: Slain enemies burst with Void energy.

risks.name: Beyond The Wall
risks.desc: Murmur enemies join ranks with Scaldra and the Techrot.

events.name: Punchcard
events.desc: Add +1.5m punch through to primary weapons.

events.name: Friendly Fallout
events.desc: Attacks from Specters or Companions have a 25% chance to cause Radiation Status.

events.name: Frequent Flyer Benefits
events.desc: Reload Speed, Fire Rate, Cast speed and Melee attack speed are increased 100% while airborne.

events.name: Free Shot
events.desc: Triggering a status effect has a 10% chance to reload the triggering bullet into the clip.

events.name: Make It Personal
events.desc: Kill 250 Scaldra Troops with Melee Weapons

events.name: Harden Up
events.desc: Increases Overshield cap by 50%. Kills grant 50 shields.

events.name: Practiced Precision
events.desc: +20% Melee Critical Chance (x2 for Heavy Attacks).

jobs.challenge: Awaken a dormant Void Angel and defeat it
Defeat the Mocking or Scathing Whisper
Collect Vosphene Glyphs to active 4 defenses
